family_fingerprint_comment: Reference roughness anchor for gap overlays and nuisance comparisons.
Front-gap keeps a front-to-transition dominant signature with secondary rear coupling.
Front roughness primarily reshapes front and transition-window envelope/background.
Rear-gap keeps a transition-to-rear nonlinear reconstruction signature on roughness background.
Rear roughness acts more like rear-window envelope/amplitude perturbation than rigid shift.
Rear-window fringe shift remains the dominant signature of local PVK thickness variation.
